examples: In a case reminiscent of the British canoeist who "returned from the dead" five years after he went missing, the man's wife said he had drowned while windsurfing on holiday in Greece.
Tributes have been paid to a canoeist who died in Cornwall on New Year's Day.
Olympic gold medal-winning canoeist Etienne Stott has been awarded the honorary freedom of the borough of Bedford.
On Monday canoeist Jovino Gonzalez was thrown off the Spanish team after failing a surprise pre-Olympic drug test.
